revision.comment: /* Parameters */ +1
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for clobbered parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} To use the template, copy the wikitext below, and paste it in the top section of the article’s main page. If the article is not divided into sections, it should be placed on top. Then, fill out the data fields. You can omit any unused fields. == Usage == {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size | alt | caption | native_name | native_name_lang | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | nationality | education | occupation | period | notable_works | spouse | children | era | language | tradition_movement | school_tradition | main_interests | notable_ideas | signature | signature_alt | signature_size }} {{Infobox theologian | honorific_prefix = | name = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | nationality = | education = | occupation = | period = | notable_works = | spouse = | children = | era = | language = | tradition_movement = | school_tradition = | main_interests = | notable_ideas = | signature = | signature_alt = | signature_size = }} == Parameters == This template accepts all parameters that {{tl|Infobox person}} does, see [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. Theological parameters are shown below: ; religion : e.g., Christian ; denomination : specific denomination ; ordination : date of ordination ; ordained_by : person who performed the ordination ; era : dates that theologian was active ; language : language that theologian wrote their main texts ; tradition_movement : strain of theology practiced (e.g, Calvinism) ; main_interests : Should be explained in the main text of the article; Those that are not mentioned in the main text may be deleted. ; notable_ideas : Should be explained in the main text of the article; Those that are not mentioned in the main text may be deleted. ; child_header : when embedded in another infobox, by default, this infobox starts with a '''Theology career''' header. If child_header is an explicit "no", this header is suppressed == Example == {{Infobox theologian | name = John Calvin | image = John Calvin 2.jpg | caption = Barcelona, Spain, 1554. | birth_name = Jean Cauvin | birth_date = {{Birth date|1510|07|19|df=yes}} For living people supply only the year unless the exact date is already WIDELY published, as per [[WP:DOB]]. Treat such cases as if only the year is known, so use {{tl|birth year and age}} or a similar option. | birth_place = [[Noyon]], [[Picardy]],
[[Kingdom of France|France]] | death_date = {{Death date and age|1564|05|27|1509|07|10|df=yes}} | death_place = [[Geneva]], [[Old Swiss Confederacy|Switzerland]] | occupation = [[Protestant Reformers|Reformer]], [[Minister (Christianity)|minister]], [[author]] | notable_works = ''[[Institutes of the Christian Religion]]'' | main_interests = [[Systematic theology]] | notable_ideas = [[Predestination]], [[Monergism]] | signature = John Calvin signature.png | signature_size = 170px }} {{Infobox theologian | name = John Calvin | image = John Calvin 2.jpg | caption = Barcelona, Spain, 1554. | birth_name = Jean Cauvin | birth_date = {{Birth date|1510|07|19|df=yes}} For living people supply only the year unless the exact date is already WIDELY published, as per [[WP:DOB]]. Treat such cases as if only the year is known, so use {{tl|birth year and age}} or a similar option. | birth_place = [[Noyon]], [[Picardy (region)|Picardy]],
[[Kingdom of France|France]] | death_date = {{Death date and age|1564|05|27|1509|07|10|df=yes}} | death_place = [[Geneva]], [[Old Swiss Confederacy|Switzerland]] | occupation = [[Protestant Reformer|Reformer]], [[Minister (Christianity)|minister]], author | notable_works = ''[[Institutes of the Christian Religion]]'' | main_interests = [[Systematic theology]] | notable_ideas = [[Predestination]], [[Monergism]] | signature = John Calvin signature.png | signature_size = 170px }} == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox theologian with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox theologian with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox theologian with embed equal yes}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox person}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Theology work group|Infobox Theologian]] [[Category:Christian infobox templates|Theologian]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Theologian]] [[Category:Templates calling Infobox person|Theologian]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

If the article is not divided into sections, it should be placed on top. Then, fill out the data fields. You can omit any unused fields. == Usage == {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size | alt | caption | native_name | native_name_lang | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | nationality | education | occupation | period | notable_works | spouse | children | era | language | tradition_movement | school_tradition | main_interests | notable_ideas | signature | signature_alt | signature_size }} {{Infobox theologian | honorific_prefix = | name = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | nationality = | education = | occupation = | period = | notable_works = | spouse = | children = | era = | language = | tradition_movement = | school_tradition = | main_interests = | notable_ideas = | signature = | signature_alt = | signature_size = }} == Parameters == This template accepts all parameters that {{tl|Infobox person}} does, see [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. Theological parameters are shown below: ; religion : e.g., Christian ; denomination : specific denomination ; ordination : date of ordination ; ordained_by : person who performed the ordination ; era : dates that theologian was active ; language : language that theologian wrote their main texts ; tradition_movement : strain of theology practiced (e.g, Calvinism) ; main_interests : Should be explained in the main text of the article; Those that are not mentioned in the main text may be deleted. ; notable_ideas : Should be explained in the main text of the article; Those that are not mentioned in the main text may be deleted. ; child_header : when embedded in another infobox, by default, this infobox starts with a '''Theology career''' header. If child_header is an explicit "no", this header is suppressed == Example == {{Infobox theologian | name = John Calvin | image = John Calvin 2.jpg | caption = Barcelona, Spain, 1554. | birth_name = Jean Cauvin | birth_date = {{Birth date|1510|07|19|df=yes}} For living people supply only the year unless the exact date is already WIDELY published, as per [[WP:DOB]]. Treat such cases as if only the year is known, so use {{tl|birth year and age}} or a similar option. | birth_place = [[Noyon]], [[Picardy]],
[[Kingdom of France|France]] | death_date = {{Death date and age|1564|05|27|1509|07|10|df=yes}} | death_place = [[Geneva]], [[Old Swiss Confederacy|Switzerland]] | occupation = [[Protestant Reformers|Reformer]], [[Minister (Christianity)|minister]], [[author]] | notable_works = ''[[Institutes of the Christian Religion]]'' | main_interests = [[Systematic theology]] | notable_ideas = [[Predestination]], [[Monergism]] | signature = John Calvin signature.png | signature_size = 170px }} {{Infobox theologian | name = John Calvin | image = John Calvin 2.jpg | caption = Barcelona, Spain, 1554. | birth_name = Jean Cauvin | birth_date = {{Birth date|1510|07|19|df=yes}} For living people supply only the year unless the exact date is already WIDELY published, as per [[WP:DOB]]. Treat such cases as if only the year is known, so use {{tl|birth year and age}} or a similar option. | birth_place = [[Noyon]], [[Picardy (region)|Picardy]],
[[Kingdom of France|France]] | death_date = {{Death date and age|1564|05|27|1509|07|10|df=yes}} | death_place = [[Geneva]], [[Old Swiss Confederacy|Switzerland]] | occupation = [[Protestant Reformer|Reformer]], [[Minister (Christianity)|minister]], author | notable_works = ''[[Institutes of the Christian Religion]]'' | main_interests = [[Systematic theology]] | notable_ideas = [[Predestination]], [[Monergism]] | signature = John Calvin signature.png | signature_size = 170px }} == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox theologian with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox theologian with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox theologian with embed equal yes}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox person}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Theology work group|Infobox Theologian]] [[Category:Christian infobox templates|Theologian]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Theologian]] [[Category:Templates calling Infobox person|Theologian]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

You can omit any unused fields. == Usage == {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size | alt | caption | native_name | native_name_lang | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | nationality | education | occupation | period | notable_works | spouse | children | era | language | tradition_movement | school_tradition | main_interests | notable_ideas | signature | signature_alt | signature_size }} {{Infobox theologian | honorific_prefix = | name = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | nationality = | education = | occupation = | period = | notable_works = | spouse = | children = | era = | language = | tradition_movement = | school_tradition = | main_interests = | notable_ideas = | signature = | signature_alt = | signature_size = }} == Parameters == This template accepts all parameters that {{tl|Infobox person}} does, see [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. Theological parameters are shown below: ; religion : e.g., Christian ; denomination : specific denomination ; ordination : date of ordination ; ordained_by : person who performed the ordination ; era : dates that theologian was active ; language : language that theologian wrote their main texts ; tradition_movement : strain of theology practiced (e.g, Calvinism) ; main_interests : Should be explained in the main text of the article; Those that are not mentioned in the main text may be deleted. ; notable_ideas : Should be explained in the main text of the article; Those that are not mentioned in the main text may be deleted. ; child_header : when embedded in another infobox, by default, this infobox starts with a '''Theology career''' header. If child_header is an explicit "no", this header is suppressed == Example == {{Infobox theologian | name = John Calvin | image = John Calvin 2.jpg | caption = Barcelona, Spain, 1554. | birth_name = Jean Cauvin | birth_date = {{Birth date|1510|07|19|df=yes}} For living people supply only the year unless the exact date is already WIDELY published, as per [[WP:DOB]]. Treat such cases as if only the year is known, so use {{tl|birth year and age}} or a similar option. | birth_place = [[:en:Noyon|Noyon]], [[Picardy]],
[[:en:Kingdom of France|France]] | death_date = {{Death date and age|1564|05|27|1509|07|10|df=yes}} | death_place = [[:en:Geneva|Geneva]], [[Old Swiss Confederacy|Switzerland]] | occupation = [[Protestant Reformers|Reformer]], [[:en:Minister (Christianity)|minister]], [[:en:Author|Author]] | notable_works = ''[[:en:Institutes of the Christian Religion|Institutes of the Christian Religion]]'' | main_interests = [[Systematic theology]] | notable_ideas = [[Predestination]], [[Monergism]] | signature = John Calvin signature.png | signature_size = 170px }} {{Infobox theologian | name = John Calvin | image = John Calvin 2.jpg | caption = Barcelona, Spain, 1554. | birth_name = Jean Cauvin | birth_date = {{Birth date|1510|07|19|df=yes}} For living people supply only the year unless the exact date is already WIDELY published, as per [[WP:DOB]]. Treat such cases as if only the year is known, so use {{tl|birth year and age}} or a similar option. | birth_place = [[:en:Noyon|Noyon]], [[Picardy (region)|Picardy]],
[[:en:Kingdom of France|France]] | death_date = {{Death date and age|1564|05|27|1509|07|10|df=yes}} | death_place = [[:en:Geneva|Geneva]], [[Old Swiss Confederacy|Switzerland]] | occupation = [[Protestant Reformer|Reformer]], [[:en:Minister (Christianity)|minister]], author | notable_works = ''[[:en:Institutes of the Christian Religion|Institutes of the Christian Religion]]'' | main_interests = [[Systematic theology]] | notable_ideas = [[Predestination]], [[Monergism]] | signature = John Calvin signature.png | signature_size = 170px }} == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox theologian with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox theologian with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox theologian with embed equal yes}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox person}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Theology work group|Infobox Theologian]] [[Category:Christian infobox templates|Theologian]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Theologian]] [[Category:s calling Infobox person|Theologian]] [[Category:s that add a tracking category|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for clobbered parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} To use the template, copy the wikitext below, and paste it in the top section of the article’s main page. If the article is not divided into sections, it should be placed on top. Then, fill out the data fields. You can omit any unused fields. == Usage == {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size | alt | caption | native_name | native_name_lang | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | nationality | education | occupation | period | notable_works | spouse | children | era | language | tradition_movement | school_tradition | main_interests | notable_ideas | signature | signature_alt | signature_size }} {{Infobox theologian | honorific_prefix = | name = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | nationality = | education = | occupation = | period = | notable_works = | spouse = | children = | era = | language = | tradition_movement = | school_tradition = | main_interests = | notable_ideas = | signature = | signature_alt = | signature_size = }} == Parameters == This template accepts all parameters that {{tl|Infobox person}} does, see [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. Theological parameters are shown below: ; religion : e.g., Christian ; denomination : specific denomination ; ordination : date of ordination ; ordained_by : person who performed the ordination ; era : dates that theologian was active ; language : language that theologian wrote their main texts ; tradition_movement : strain of theology practiced (e.g, Calvinism) ; main_interests : Should be explained in the main text of the article; Those that are not mentioned in the main text may be deleted. ; notable_ideas : Should be explained in the main text of the article; Those that are not mentioned in the main text may be deleted. ; child_header : when embedded in another infobox, by default, this infobox starts with a '''Theology career''' header. If child_header is an explicit "no", this header is suppressed == Example == {{Infobox theologian | name = John Calvin | image = John Calvin 2.jpg | caption = Barcelona, Spain, 1554. | birth_name = Jean Cauvin | birth_date = {{Birth date|1510|07|19|df=yes}} For living people supply only the year unless the exact date is already WIDELY published, as per [[WP:DOB]]. revision.comment: /* Tracking categories */ track deprecated parameters
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Uses infobox person|wrapped=1}} {{Lua|Module:Template wrapper|Module:Check for conflicting parameters}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18|cat=No local image but image on Wikidata}} To use the template, copy the wikitext below, and paste it in the top section of the article’s main page. If the article is not divided into sections, it should be placed on top. Then, fill out the data fields. You can omit any unused fields. == Usage == {{Parameter names example | honorific_prefix | name | honorific_suffix | image | image_size | alt | caption | native_name | native_name_lang | birth_name | birth_date | birth_place | death_date | death_place | education | occupation | period | notable_works | spouse | children | era | language | tradition_movement | school_tradition | main_interests | notable_ideas | signature | signature_alt | signature_size }} {{Infobox theologian | honorific_prefix = | name = | honorific_suffix = | image = | image_size = | alt = | caption = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | birth_name = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | education = | occupation = | period = | notable_works = | spouse = | children = | era = | language = | tradition_movement = | school_tradition = | main_interests = | notable_ideas = | signature = | signature_alt = | signature_size = }} == Parameters == This template accepts all parameters that {{tl|Infobox person}} does, see [[Template:Infobox person/doc#Parameters|here]] for a complete list. Theological parameters are shown below: ; religion : e.g., Christian ; denomination : specific denomination ; ordination : date of ordination ; ordained_by : person who performed the ordination ; era : dates that theologian was active ; language : language that theologian wrote their main texts ; tradition_movement : strain of theology practiced (e.g, Calvinism) ; main_interests : Should be explained in the main text of the article; Those that are not mentioned in the main text may be deleted. ; notable_ideas : Should be explained in the main text of the article; Those that are not mentioned in the main text may be deleted. ; child_header : when embedded in another infobox, by default, this infobox starts with a '''Theology career''' header. If child_header is an explicit "no", this header is suppressed == Example == {{Infobox theologian | name = John Calvin | image = John Calvin 2.jpg | caption = Barcelona, Spain, 1554. | birth_name = Jean Cauvin | birth_date = {{Birth date|1510|07|19|df=yes}} For living people supply only the year unless the exact date is already WIDELY published, as per [[WP:DOB]]. Treat such cases as if only the year is known, so use {{tl|birth year and age}} or a similar option. | birth_place = [[Noyon]], [[Picardy]],
[[Kingdom of France|France]] | death_date = {{Death date and age|1564|05|27|1509|07|10|df=yes}} | death_place = [[Geneva]], [[Old Swiss Confederacy|Switzerland]] | occupation = [[Protestant Reformers|Reformer]], [[Minister (Christianity)|minister]], [[author]] | notable_works = ''[[Institutes of the Christian Religion]]'' | main_interests = [[Systematic theology]] | notable_ideas = [[Predestination]], [[Monergism]] | signature = John Calvin signature.png | signature_size = 170px }} {{Infobox theologian | name = John Calvin | image = John Calvin 2.jpg | caption = Barcelona, Spain, 1554. | birth_name = Jean Cauvin | birth_date = {{Birth date|1510|07|19|df=yes}} For living people supply only the year unless the exact date is already WIDELY published, as per [[WP:DOB]]. Treat such cases as if only the year is known, so use {{tl|birth year and age}} or a similar option. | birth_place = [[Noyon]], [[Picardy (region)|Picardy]],
[[Kingdom of France|France]] | death_date = {{Death date and age|1564|05|27|1509|07|10|df=yes}} | death_place = [[Geneva]], [[Old Swiss Confederacy|Switzerland]] | occupation = [[Protestant Reformer|Reformer]], [[Minister (Christianity)|minister]], author | notable_works = ''[[Institutes of the Christian Religion]]'' | main_interests = [[Systematic theology]] | notable_ideas = [[Predestination]], [[Monergism]] | signature = John Calvin signature.png | signature_size = 170px }} == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox theologian with unknown parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox theologian with conflicting parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox theologian with deprecated parameters}} * {{clc|Pages using infobox theologian with embed equal yes}} * {{clc|No local image but image on Wikidata}} – Used by [[Template:Wikidata image]] to track articles where an infobox has no image but [[Wikidata]] has an image name. To exclude articles from this category, add an image or {{para|nocat_wdimage|yes}} to the infobox. == See also == * {{tl|Infobox person}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Theology work group|Infobox Theologian]] [[Category:Christian infobox templates|Theologian]] [[Category:People and person infobox templates|Theologian]] [[Category:Templates calling Infobox person|Theologian]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category|{{PAGENAME}}]] }}
